verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Every action logged; Reversible from log; Stored in durable plane; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.logging_evidence: Two full cycles produce exactly [acquire, release, acquire, release] in order — the log is append-only and complete.
gate_result.revert_evidence: revertFromLog() reconstructs current holds from the log alone and releases them all (two live holds released, lease dir gone, zero holds remain), then audits the revert.
gate_result.durable_evidence: The operational audit log writes to /home/flexnetos/meta/var/xdg-data/lifeos/host-control/audit.jsonl — the tier map's durable xdg-data root — verified by a real write-and-read on the durable plane.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real durable-plane file writes under meta/var.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-105 is complete: every control action is logged append-only, the holds are reversible from the log alone (revertFromLog releases everything the log says is held), and the operational log lives on the durable plane under meta/var/xdg-data.
